data.body: Third review BLOCK remediation: accepted ff7bc24274b55f509 by specifying dirty/unmerged detection as new logic using status --porcelain plus ls-files -u, followed by strict rev-parse; all git/IO/path/output failures map to store-read-failure. Accepted fb272b0e5ca42f5bd by defining one explicit O(store) compiled-state preload including archived tickets before inbound scan. Accepted related advisories: refresh_attestation collects fresh relations internally; deleted pinned targets intentionally prevent refresh/re-sign until relationship repair; partial deployment is prohibited until 5967 atomically activates all sign paths; attest re-export coverage is explicit. Removed redundant ACs to return below the oversize boundary. Rerunning before downstream work.
